tr.td: HIV.IND.62 Syphilis test positivity, HIV prevention services

div.p: % of people attending HIV prevention services who were tested for syphilis and had a positive syphilis test result during the reporting period

tr.td:
ID: HIV.IND.62.IP
Description:
Initial Population
Logic Definition: Initial Population

ID: HIV.IND.62.DEN
Description:
Number of people attending HIV prevention services tested for syphilis |
Logic Definition: Denominator

ID: HIV.IND.62.NUM
Description:
Number of people attending HIV prevention services who tested positive for syphilis during the reporting period (tested positive on both nontreponemal and treponemal tests or tested positive on either nontreponemal or treponemal test) |
Logic Definition: Numerator

Description: FHIR model information
Resource: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIR-ModelInfo|4.0.1

Description: Library HE
Resource: HIVElements
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVElements

Description: Library Concepts
Resource: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConcepts|0.0.2

Resource: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIRHelpers|4.0.1
Canonical URL: http://fhir.org/guides/cqf/common/Library/FHIRHelpers|4.0.1

Description: Library ConceptsCustom
Resource: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConceptsCustom|0.0.1
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVConceptsCustom|0.0.1

Resource: WHOCommon
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/WHOCommon

Description: Library HIE
Resource: HIVIndicatorElements
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/Library/HIVIndicatorElements

Description: Code system HIVConcepts
Resource: WHO SMART HIV Concepts CodeSystem
Canonical URL: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Description: Code system missing concepts
Resource: https://worldhealthorganization.github.io/smart-hiv/CodeSystem/missing-concepts
Canonical URL: https://worldhealthorganization.github.io/smart-hiv/CodeSystem/missing-concepts

Canonical URL: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category

Description: Code system ConditionClinicalStatusCodes

Canonical URL: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical

Description: Code system ConditionCategoryCodes

Canonical URL: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category

Display: Syphilis test result
Code: HIV.B.DE250
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: PrEP for HIV prevention
Code: HIV.C.DE76
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: STI testing and treatment services
Code: HIV.B.DE164
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: VMMC procedure performed
Code: HIV.B.DE197
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: HIV prevention intervention
Code: HIV.PRV.DE2
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Transgender female
Code: HIV.A.DE22
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Transgender male
Code: HIV.A.DE21
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Key population member*
Code: HIV.B.DE49
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Display: Social History
Code: social-history
System: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category

Display: Encounter Diagnosis
Code: encounter-diagnosis
System: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category

Display: HIV status
Code: HIV.B.DE115
System: http://smart.who.int/hiv/CodeSystem/HIVConcepts

Name: Measurement Period
Use: In
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: Period

Name: Numerator
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: boolean

Name: Denominator
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: boolean

Name: Initial Population
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: boolean

Name: Stratification
Use: Out
Min Cardinality: 0
Max Cardinality: 1
Type: string

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: code, status, value, partOf
Code Filter(s):
Path: code
Code:

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: code, status, category, effective, issued, code.coding
Code Filter(s):
Path: code
Code:

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: code, status, value, issued, effective
Code Filter(s):
Path: code
Code:

Type: Observation
Profile(s):
Observation
Must Support Elements: status, code, value, effective

Type: Procedure
Profile(s):
Procedure
Must Support Elements: status, code, performed

Type: MedicationStatement
Profile(s):
MedicationStatement
Must Support Elements: reasonCode, effective

Type: EpisodeOfCare
Profile(s):
EpisodeOfCare
Must Support Elements: type, period, statusHistory

Type: Patient
Profile(s):
Patient
Must Support Elements: use

Type: Condition
Profile(s):
Condition
Must Support Elements: code, clinicalStatus, category, onset
Code Filter(s):
Path: code
Code:

pre.code:
/** * Numerator * * Definition: Number of people attending HIV prevention services who tested positive for syphilis during the reporting period (tested positive on both nontreponemal and treponemal tests or tested positive on either nontreponemal or treponemal test) | * Calculation: COUNT of clients with "Syphilis test date" in the reporting period AND "Syphilis test result"='Positive' */
define "Numerator": exists(HE."Positive B.DE251" S with HE."Syphilis test date B.DE249" P such that S.partOf.references(P) and P.performed.toInterval() during "Measurement Period")
define "PrEP service date": [MedicationStatement] MS where exists(MS.reasonCode C where C ~ Concepts."PrEP for HIV prevention") return start of MS.effective.toInterval()
define "STI services date": [Procedure] P where P.status = 'completed' and P.code ~ Concepts."STI testing and treatment services" return start of P.performed.toInterval()
define "OAMT status date": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") return start of EOC.period

/** * Denominator * * Definition: Number of people attending HIV prevention services tested for syphilis | * Calculation: COUNT of clients with "Syphilis test date" on "Date accessed HIV prevention intervention" in the reporting period */
define "Denominator": exists(HE."Syphilis test date B.DE249" P where P.performed.toInterval() during "Measurement Period" and exists (HE."Date accessed HIV prevention intervention" t where t = start of P.performed.toInterval()))

define "By Age Stratifier 9": case when "Age In Years" >= 15 and "Age In Years"<= 19 then '15-19' when "Age In Years" <= 24 then '20-24' when "Age In Years" <= 29 then '25–29' when "Age In Years" <= 49 then '30–49' when "Age In Years" >= 50 then '50+' else null end

define "Key population member type Observation": Elements."Key population member type Observation" O where O.effective.toInterval() before end of "Measurement Period" or O.issued before end of "Measurement Period"
define "OAMT status": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") return EOC.period
define "OAMT statusHistory": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") and (exists ( EOC.statusHistory H where H.period is not null))

define "HIV Status Positive Condition": [Condition: Concepts."HIV-positive - HIV.B.DE116"] C where C.clinicalStatus ~ ConceptsCustom."active" and exists(C.category CC where CC ~ ConceptsCustom."encounter-diagnosis") sort by start of onset.toInterval()
define "HIV Status Positive Condition": Elements."HIV Status Positive Condition" C where C.onset before end of "Measurement Period"
define "HIV Status Positive Observation": "HIV Status Observation" O where O.value ~ Concepts."HIV-positive - HIV.B.DE116" sort by start of effective.toInterval()

define "HIV Status Positive Observation": Elements."HIV Status Positive Observation" O where O.issued before end of "Measurement Period" or O.effective.toInterval() starts before end of "Measurement Period"
define "Has HIV-positive Status": exists "HIV Status Positive Condition" or exists "HIV Status Positive Observation"
define "HIV Status Negative Observation": "HIV Status Observation" O where O.value ~ Concepts."HIV-negative - HIV.B.DE117" sort by start of effective.toInterval()

/* End of HIV-positive B.DE116 */
define "HIV Status Negative Observation": Elements."HIV Status Negative Observation" O where O.issued before end of "Measurement Period" or O.effective.toInterval() starts before end of "Measurement Period"

define "Stratification": HIE."By Administrative Gender Stratifier".code + ':' + HIE."By Age Stratifier 9" + ':' + HIE."By Geographic Region Stratifier" + Combine(HIE.patientGroups, ':') + Combine(HIE."HIV prevention intervention", ':') + ':' + HIE."HIV Status Stratifier".code
define function ToString(value ObservationStatus): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define function ToString(value ProcedureStatus): value.value
define function ToString(value string): value.value

define function ToInterval(period FHIR.Period): if period is null then null else if period."start" is null then Interval(period."start".value, period."end".value] else Interval[period."start".value, period."end".value]
define function ToString(value AdministrativeGender): value.value
define function ToString(value AddressUse): value.value
define function ToDateTime(value instant): value.value
define function ToDateTime(value dateTime): value.value

tr.th: Generated using version 0.4.6 of the sample-content-ig Liquid templates

valueString.value: Syphilis test result B.DE250
Positive B.DE251
Syphilis test date B.DE249

/** * Numerator * * Definition: Number of people attending HIV prevention services who tested positive for syphilis during the reporting period (tested positive on both nontreponemal and treponemal tests or tested positive on either nontreponemal or treponemal test) | * Calculation: COUNT of clients with "Syphilis test date" in the reporting period AND "Syphilis test result"='Positive' */
define "Numerator": exists(HE."Positive B.DE251" S with HE."Syphilis test date B.DE249" P such that S.partOf.references(P) and P.performed.toInterval() during "Measurement Period")
PrEP service date
define "PrEP service date": [MedicationStatement] MS where exists(MS.reasonCode C where C ~ Concepts."PrEP for HIV prevention") return start of MS.effective.toInterval()
STI services date
define "STI services date": [Procedure] P where P.status = 'completed' and P.code ~ Concepts."STI testing and treatment services" return start of P.performed.toInterval()
VMMC date
Other PRV.DE8 date
OAMT status date
define "OAMT status date": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") return start of EOC.period
Date accessed HIV prevention intervention

/** * Denominator * * Definition: Number of people attending HIV prevention services tested for syphilis | * Calculation: COUNT of clients with "Syphilis test date" on "Date accessed HIV prevention intervention" in the reporting period */
define "Denominator": exists(HE."Syphilis test date B.DE249" P where P.performed.toInterval() during "Measurement Period" and exists (HE."Date accessed HIV prevention intervention" t where t = start of P.performed.toInterval()))
Initial Population
By Administrative Gender Stratifier
Age In Years
By Age Stratifier 9

define "By Age Stratifier 9": case when "Age In Years" >= 15 and "Age In Years"<= 19 then '15-19' when "Age In Years" <= 24 then '20-24' when "Age In Years" <= 29 then '25–29' when "Age In Years" <= 49 then '30–49' when "Age In Years" >= 50 then '50+' else null end
By Geographic Region Stratifier
Key population member type Observation
Key population member type Observation

define "Key population member type Observation": Elements."Key population member type Observation" O where O.effective.toInterval() before end of "Measurement Period" or O.issued before end of "Measurement Period"
PrEP service
PrEP service
OAMT status
define "OAMT status": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") return EOC.period
OAMT statusHistory
define "OAMT statusHistory": [EpisodeOfCare] EOC where exists(EOC.type T where T ~ Concepts."OAMT") and (exists ( EOC.statusHistory H where H.period is not null))
STI services
STI services
Other PRV.DE8
Other PRV.DE8
HIV prevention intervention
HIV Status Positive Condition

define "HIV Status Positive Condition": [Condition: Concepts."HIV-positive - HIV.B.DE116"] C where C.clinicalStatus ~ ConceptsCustom."active" and exists(C.category CC where CC ~ ConceptsCustom."encounter-diagnosis") sort by start of onset.toInterval()
HIV Status Positive Condition
define "HIV Status Positive Condition": Elements."HIV Status Positive Condition" C where C.onset before end of "Measurement Period"
HIV Status Observation
HIV Status Positive Observation
define "HIV Status Positive Observation": "HIV Status Observation" O where O.value ~ Concepts."HIV-positive - HIV.B.DE116" sort by start of effective.toInterval()
HIV Status Positive Observation

define "HIV Status Positive Observation": Elements."HIV Status Positive Observation" O where O.issued before end of "Measurement Period" or O.effective.toInterval() starts before end of "Measurement Period"
Has HIV-positive Status
define "Has HIV-positive Status": exists "HIV Status Positive Condition" or exists "HIV Status Positive Observation"
HIV Status Negative Observation
define "HIV Status Negative Observation": "HIV Status Observation" O where O.value ~ Concepts."HIV-negative - HIV.B.DE117" sort by start of effective.toInterval()
HIV Status Negative Observation

/* End of HIV-positive B.DE116 */
define "HIV Status Negative Observation": Elements."HIV Status Negative Observation" O where O.issued before end of "Measurement Period" or O.effective.toInterval() starts before end of "Measurement Period"
HIV Status Stratifier

define "Stratification": HIE."By Administrative Gender Stratifier".code + ':' + HIE."By Age Stratifier 9" + ':' + HIE."By Geographic Region Stratifier" + Combine(HIE.patientGroups, ':') + Combine(HIE."HIV prevention intervention", ':') + ':' + HIE."HIV Status Stratifier".code
define function ToString(value ObservationStatus): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define function ToString(value ProcedureStatus): value.value
define function ToString(value string): value.value

define function ToInterval(period FHIR.Period): if period is null then null else if period."start" is null then Interval(period."start".value, period."end".value] else Interval[period."start".value, period."end".value]
define function ToString(value AdministrativeGender): value.value
define function ToString(value AddressUse): value.value
define function ToDateTime(value instant): value.value
define function ToDateTime(value dateTime): value.value

title.value: HIV.IND.62 Syphilis test positivity, HIV prevention services

description.value: % of people attending HIV prevention services who were tested for syphilis and had a positive syphilis test result during the reporting period
Number of people attending HIV prevention services tested for syphilis |

Number of people attending HIV prevention services who tested positive for syphilis during the reporting period (tested positive on both nontreponemal and treponemal tests or tested positive on either nontreponemal or treponemal test) |
